sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114200" key="xlou/neios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλούνειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the wild boar,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl>: neut. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Χλούνειον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> place-name, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg3136.tlg001:2:459" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.459</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
